name: TestIso11783IL_OPSetAudioVolume
title: TestIso11783IL_OPSetAudioVolume
syntax: long TestIso11783IL_OPSetAudioVolume( dbNode node, dword volume );
description: The function sets the audio volume of the Virtual Terminal. A Set Audio Volume command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.
